title: Product A US clinics hero — temporary placeholder
description: Temporary governed placeholder for the Product A / US clinics hero background (/product-a/us-clinics). Tasteful abstract luxury visual in warm stone and blush tones evoking a calm premium treatment environment. Vector-only, CorpFlowAI-authored, no people and no clinical/medical detail. Replace with a vetted premium medspa/aesthetic-clinic interior photograph (stock_licensed or ai_generated with provenance) before production launch.

licence.terms: CorpFlowAI-authored vector placeholder. No third-party IP, no stock, no AI generation. Temporary; replace per the replacement note in usage.notes and bump the id on replacement (never overwrite a published path).

accessibility.alt: Soft warm stone and blush abstract suggesting a calm, premium clinic treatment environment.

usage.primary_cta: Request a Website & Lead Rescue Audit
usage.notes: slot:product_a_hero. Full-bleed fixed background under a dark scrim; rendered decoratively (alt="") because surrounding copy carries the meaning. REPLACEMENT: swap for a vetted premium medspa/aesthetic-clinic interior or calm luxury treatment-room photograph — responsive AVIF/WebP set, no identifiable patients, no real before/after, no clinical PII. On replacement, create a new id (e.g. product-a-hero-clinic-v2) and retire this manifest.
